message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ActorBorderColor #777777
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ArrowColor #222222
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB
  NoteBorderColor #777777
}

actor User as U
boundary "index.jsp" as IDX
boundary "basket.jsp" as BSK
participant "Order" as ORD
participant "Pay" as PAY
participant "LogicFacade" as LF
participant "OrderMapper" as OM
database "Database" as DB

note right of U
We assume user
is logged in
end note

U -> IDX : user clicks "add to cart"
IDX -> ORD : [for each cupcake] AddToOrder()
ORD --> IDX : redirect (msg "added to basket")
IDX --> U : display msg

U -> IDX : user clicks "show basket"
IDX -> BSK : ShowBasket()
BSK -> PAY : Pay()

PAY -> PAY : Check date
PAY -> PAY : Check if logged in
PAY -> PAY : Check balance

PAY -> LF : saveOrder()
LF -> OM : saveOrder()
OM -> DB : saves order
DB --> OM : return
OM --> LF : return
LF --> PAY : return

PAY --> IDX : redirect (msg "order placed")
IDX --> U : display msg
@enduml
